title: Jon Kabat-Zinn
lead: The scientist who brought mindfulness into mainstream medicine by creating the MBSR programme.

blocks.text: Jon Kabat-Zinn founded Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction (MBSR) at the University of Massachusetts, bringing secular mindfulness into hospitals and mainstream science.
His work sparked much of the modern research base for mindfulness in health and wellbeing.
A free online MBSR course (Palouse Mindfulness) follows his programme closely and is an excellent, structured way to begin.

resources.title: Free MBSR online course
resources.whyHere: Complete free course modelled on his MBSR programme.

resources.title: UCLA Mindful
resources.whyHere: Free guided practices in the MBSR spirit.
